title: frontend: themes: Replace deprecated MediaQueryList listener methods
author: YadavAkhileshh

findings.description: First commit missing themes: SubArea — should be 'frontend: themes: Replace deprecated MediaQueryList listener methods'.
Correct runtime feature detection (typeof mql.addEventListener === 'function') with legacy fallback. Handler type narrowed appropriately.
Both modern addEventListener and legacy addListener paths are tested with handler reference verification.
